prealgebra-2e:c2s1.reason: Algebra language builds on Grade 6 numeric expressions and order of operations.

prealgebra-2e:c2s2.reason: Evaluating and translating expressions extends G6 variables and algebra language.

prealgebra-2e:c2s3.reason: One-step equations with addition/subtraction build on G6 equation ideas.

prealgebra-2e:c2s4.reason: Multiples and factors continue G6 GCF/LCM work.

prealgebra-2e:c2s5.reason: Prime factorization and LCM deepen factoring skills.

prealgebra-2e:c3s1.reason: Integer introduction extends G6 signed numbers and absolute value.

prealgebra-2e:c3s2.reason: Adding integers requires the integer number line.

prealgebra-2e:c3s3.reason: Subtracting integers uses addition of opposites.

prealgebra-2e:c3s4.reason: Multiplying and dividing integers needs signed-number meaning; independent of add/sub fluency chain beyond basics.

prealgebra-2e:c3s5.reason: Equations with integers require integer operations and one-step equation solving.

prealgebra-2e:c4s1.reason: Visualizing fractions uses factors and multiples for equivalent fractions.

prealgebra-2e:c4s2.reason: Multiply/divide fractions extends G6 dividing fractions and fraction meaning.

prealgebra-2e:c4s3.reason: Mixed numbers and complex fractions build on fraction multiply/divide.

prealgebra-2e:c4s4.reason: Adding like-denominator fractions needs fraction meaning.

prealgebra-2e:c4s5.reason: Unlike denominators need LCD (LCM) and like-denominator addition.

prealgebra-2e:c4s7.reason: Equations with fractions need fraction ops and equation solving.

prealgebra-2e:c5s1.reason: Decimal place value continues G6 decimal work.

prealgebra-2e:c5s2.reason: Decimal operations build on decimal place value.

prealgebra-2e:c5s3.reason: Converting decimals and fractions needs both representations.

prealgebra-2e:c5s4.reason: Equations with decimals need decimal ops and equation solving.

prealgebra-2e:c5s5.reason: Averages/probability use decimal arithmetic; data context from G6 helps.

prealgebra-2e:c5s6.reason: Ratios and rates deepen G6 ratio/rate reasoning.

prealgebra-2e:c5s7.reason: Square roots build on exponents/numeric expressions language.

prealgebra-2e:c6s1.reason: Percent meaning connects G6 percents with fraction/decimal/ratio fluency.

prealgebra-2e:c6s2.reason: General percent applications use percent understanding.

prealgebra-2e:c6s4.reason: Simple interest is a percent application; independent of tax/discount.

prealgebra-2e:c6s5.reason: Proportions connect rates/ratios with percent-style part-whole reasoning.

prealgebra-2e:c7s1.reason: Rational vs irrational uses fractions and square roots.

prealgebra-2e:c7s2.reason: Commutative/associative properties formalize G6 properties of operations.

prealgebra-2e:c7s3.reason: Distributive property extends G6 equivalent expressions.

prealgebra-2e:c7s4.reason: Identity/inverse/zero properties need real-number structure and integers.

prealgebra-2e:c8s1.reason: Linear equation strategies deepen one-step equation work with integers.

prealgebra-2e:c8s2.reason: Multiplication/division properties extend addition/subtraction equation solving.

prealgebra-2e:c8s3.reason: Variables on both sides need multi-step solving and the distributive property.

prealgebra-2e:c8s4.reason: Fraction/decimal coefficients combine equation strategy with fraction/decimal ops.

prealgebra-2e:c9s2.reason: Money applications combine modeling with percent arithmetic.

prealgebra-2e:c9s3.reason: Angles/triangles/Pythagorean need square roots and equation solving.

prealgebra-2e:c9s4.reason: Rectangle/triangle/trapezoid applications extend G6 polygon area.

prealgebra-2e:c9s5.reason: Circles and irregular figures build on polygon area applications.

prealgebra-2e:c9s6.reason: Volume/surface area extend G6 polyhedra and plane-figure formulas.

prealgebra-2e:c9s7.reason: Literal equations rearrange multi-step linear equations.

prealgebra-2e:c10s1.reason: Polynomial add/subtract uses like terms and distributive thinking.

prealgebra-2e:c10s2.reason: Exponent multiplication properties build on expression language.

prealgebra-2e:c10s3.reason: Multiplying polynomials combines like terms with exponent rules.

prealgebra-2e:c10s5.reason: Integer exponents and scientific notation extend monomial exponent work.

prealgebra-2e:c10s6.reason: Intro poly factoring uses GCF and polynomial structure.

prealgebra-2e:c11s1.reason: Rectangular coordinates extend the G6 coordinate plane.

prealgebra-2e:c11s2.reason: Graphing linear equations needs coordinates and two-variable equation fluency.

prealgebra-2e:c11s3.reason: Intercept graphing is a specialized linear-graphing technique.

prealgebra-2e:c11s4.reason: Slope connects linear graphs with rate/ratio ideas.
